name: kanbantic-claude-plugin
description: Kanbantic issue lifecycle skills: intake (report / request / propose), triage, prepare, execute, review — all artifacts via Kanbantic MCP. v2.4.2 patches lane-skill SKILL.md mechanical inconsistencies (KBT-B192 / KBT-RL064): adds the missing update_validation_status lifecycle hook (NotImplemented → Implemented in execute, Implemented → Validated in review) so linked user stories no longer stay stale after Done; repairs the broken /prepare-issue and /execute-issue slash-command references in kanbantic-issue-review; corrects the stale 'Review → Done' overview wording to the canonical 'Review → InDeployment' per KBT-RL053; ships a new lint-skills static-drift detector (forward direction, complementing v2.4.1's reverse-direction check-bundle-tool-drift) wired into npm test. v2.4.1 adds a real-proxy regression test + bundle ↔ live MCP-registry drift detector (KBT-B200). v2.4.0 introduces Phase-of-Features-of-Tasks Epic shape (KBT-F250): Epics group Features into Phases instead of Tasks; each Feature has its own audit-trail. kanbantic-issue-execute auto-detects per-Phase shape (new vs legacy) — no forced migration. kanbantic-issue-review now works at three levels (Feature / Phase / Epic). Three new MCP tools enable clean Phase ↔ Feature querying: assign_feature_to_phase, assign_features_to_phase, list_features_by_phase. v2.3.0 introduced InDeployment (KBT-F236), v2.2.0 introduced Prepared (KBT-F235). See RELEASE_NOTES_v2.4.2.md.
